title: Cut UK speed limits to reduce Iran war impact on consumers, thinktank urges
summary: Cap of 20mph in towns and cities and 60mph on motorways would cut fuel demand and combat rising prices, IPPR saysBritain should lower speed limits for drivers as part of a package of measures to reduce the impact of the Iran war on consumers, a thinktank has said.Capping legal speeds at 20mph in towns and cities and 60mph on motorways would help reduce fuel demand and combat soaring oil prices triggered by conflict, according to the Institute for Public Policy Research (IPPR). Continue reading..
title_cn: 智囊团敦促英国降低速度限制，以减少伊朗战争对消费者的影响
summary_cn: IPPR 表示，城镇和城市的时速上限为 20 英里/小时，高速公路的限速为 60 英里/小时，这将减少燃料需求并应对价格上涨，英国应降低驾驶员的速度限制，作为减少燃油消耗的一揽子措施的一部分。
